title: Living in Boulder vlog 2 -  7 -  2017: Google Earthing Amphitheater Casestrense

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs late at night about his Google Earth 3D modeling project recreating ancient Roman structures, specifically the Theater of Casstrense (Amphitheater Castrense) in Rome. He discusses seating capacity calculations, his multi-step modeling workflow, and plans to continue with the Circus Maximus and a water theater concept.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Worth building even with 4,200-person capacity because it helps visualize scale in relatable terms
Committed to it because there's enough development going on to fill videos
